sentences.arabic: زَارَ النَّاسُ الْأَسْوَاقَ الْمَحَلِّيَّةَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su posjetili lokalne pijace rano ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: People visited local markets early in the morning.

sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَ الْمُسْتَهْلِكُونَ ارْتِفَاعاً فِي أَسْعَارِ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ.
sentences.translation: Potrošači su primijetili porast cijena povrća i voća.
sentences.translationEn: Consumers noticed a rise in the prices of vegetables and fruits.

sentences.arabic: تَبْحَثُ الْأُسَرُ عَنْ طُرُقٍ لِتَوْفِيرِ الْمَالِ عِنْدَ الشِّرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice traže načine da uštede novac prilikom kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: Families are looking for ways to save money when shopping.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ التُّجَّارُ إِنَّ النَّقْلَ أَصْبَحَ مُكْلِفاً جِدّاً هَذَا الشَّهْرَ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci su rekli da je transport postao veoma skup ovog mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants said that transport has become very expensive this month.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ الْحُكُومَةُ عَلَى مُرَاقَبَةِ الْأَسْعَارِ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الْمُوَاطِنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Vlada radi na praćenju cijena kako bi pomogla građanima.
sentences.translationEn: The government is working on monitoring prices to help citizens.
